Change the Maven compiler release target from Java 17 to Java 21.
mysql-import-sql/pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to Java 21; without this change, the code would be compiled for Java 17, potentially missing Java 21 features or causing incompatibilities with Java 21-specific libraries.
